finding_info.title: Root account does not have MFA enabled
finding_info.desc: The root account has no MFA device configured, allowing password-only access to the most privileged identity.

remediation.desc: Enable a hardware or virtual MFA device on the root account.

finding_info.title: S3 bucket allows public access
finding_info.desc: The bucket ACL or policy permits unauthenticated reads.

remediation.desc: Enable S3 Block Public Access at the account level or restrict the bucket policy.

finding_info.title: CloudTrail is not enabled in all regions
finding_info.desc: Multi-region trail is not configured, leaving API activity in some regions unmonitored.

remediation.desc: Create a multi-region trail or update the existing trail to cover all regions.

finding_info.title: IAM password policy requires minimum 14 characters
finding_info.desc: Password policy meets the recommended minimum length.

finding_info.title: Security group allows unrestricted ingress on port 22
finding_info.desc: The security group permits SSH access from 0.0.0.0/0.

remediation.desc: Restrict the security group inbound rule to specific CIDR ranges or use a bastion host.
